pylablib_scale_note: pylablib has no Z825 entry; Z825 is the 25 mm travel scale used for similar stages. If Kinesis mm readout disagrees with Python moves, measure travel and set pylablib_scale to 'step' and use encoder --start/--stop/--step only.

kinesis.return_velocity_note: Used only after continuous-scan: K-Cube max speed for move back to start (matches typical Kinesis jog; faster than FTS crawl).
